titleStmt.title: SII 15.74: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 74. (B.K. No. 5 of 27-28.) KŌḌĪKOPPANAGUḌḌA, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab leaning against the wall to the left of entrance into the central shrine of Kālakālēśvara.

This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Prajāpati, Kārttika-puṇṇami, Monday. The date is irregular including the wrong citation of the cyclic year. The 10th year of the king coincides with Ānanda, when the details regularly correspond to 1194 A.D., October 1, Monday. On this day there was a lunar eclipse which is not mentioned in the record.

It registers a gift of land by the king's subordinate Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Āchidēva for offerings, etc., in the temple of Kaḷakaḷēśvara. The genealogical succession of the donor is given as follows: Ācharasa I, his son Bammarasa, the former's brother Singa's son, Ācharasa II, (his son) Chāvuṇḍa and (his son) Āchidēva. It becomes thus evident that this Āchidēva belonged to the Sinda family of the Erambarage branch. Cf. Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XX, p. 114.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha(ṁ)
mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . mēruvina taṭadoḷīśanadārānuṁ
tārāgrihadoḷu bhārati baradaḷu gōtrācāraṁ śivayōgikāma(ṁ)
naṁbakkaravaṁ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsva
raṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmattribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvaradēvavijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā(r)namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sa
luttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu . moneyoḷu kūrppaṁ tōṟu
ttuvanuvaradoḷu baladoḷamarutuṁ tribhuvanamallana kaṭṭidalagineṁteseda Ā
carasamaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ bhūtaḷadoḷu . Avaroḷagācarasaṁgī bhuvanajanaṁ pogaḷe ne
gaḷda baṁmarasaṁ puṭṭi visēsa vibhavamaṁ cakravartti kuḍe paḍedanātmasauryyōṁnnatiyaṁ .
Ātana tammaṁ siṁgamahītaḷapati saṁbhavaṁ virōdhinarēṁdra(ṁ) rbbhītiyane
yduvinaṁ vikhyātaṁ negaḷdaṁ pratāpadiṁdācarasaṁ . maravaṇiyiṁde gōveyma
nuppinakaṭṭeymaṁ pratāpadiṁduripi kaḷiṁga vaṁga mēru gūrjjara māḷa
va cēra cōḷa bhūparanadhipaṁge biṭṭivesadiṁ naḍivokkalenalke māḍidācarasano
ḷaṁṇna mattuḷida ṭuṁṭukamaṁḍalikarssamānamē . vīraṁ cāgavīveraḍe nripārādhyaguṇaṁ
guṇaṁgaḷavu nijaṁ tanagene dhātrīramaṇaṁ tiḷakanesedanudāra guṇādhāra vīracāvuṁḍa
nripaṁ . © svasti śrīmatu pratāpacakravartthi vīrasōmēśvaradēvavarṣada 10 neya prajāpa
ti saṁvatsarada kārttikada puṇnami sōmavāra byatīpāta śrī svayaṁbhu kaḷakaḷēśvaradē
vara śrīkāryyakke mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhujabaḷabhīma sāhasōttuṁga satya
rādhēya nuḍidaṁte gaṁḍa dānaguṇamahimōṁnatanumappa Ācidēvarasa
ru Ā dēvara nityapaḍiya naivēdyake kāḷēśvaradēvariṁ teṁkalu gaddekaṁbaṁ nānūṟu Ūriṁ
daṁ mūḍalu karuvana gadeIṁ paḍuvalu gade kaṁbaṁ nānūṟu kārigitiya
dāriyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu benakana beṭṭadiṁ paḍavalu mattaru haṁneraḍu 12 kārttikada puṇnami
yalu Ā parvvada satrakkevoriṁ mūḍalu sōmanātha dēvaratōṁṭadiṁ baḍagalu matta
ru nāluku 4 .
Digital edition of SII 15.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
